text:
Shipped a few things this week to make your HTTP calls a little happier. 🛠️ Moved some heavy lifters (kimi, deepseek, glm) over to Fireworks, so text generation is noticeably faster and smarter. Sana image generation is now sitting at a ridiculous 165ms. And for the frontend folks, we fixed the CORS headers — OpenAI SDKs now work directly in the browser. No more proxy gymnastics. 

pollinations.ai

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #frontend #buildinpublic
